parameters.jsonBody:
={{ { "model": "llama-3.3-70b-versatile", "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": "You are a security intent router. Analyze the user request carefully:

Reply with 'GITHUB' ONLY if: the user asks to analyze a GitHub user/profile/repository, or the message contains the word 'github' and a likely username (e.g., 'analyze this github octocat').

Reply with 'SCAN' ONLY if: user mentions 'scan', 'nmap', 'port', 'network scan', or provides an IP address (xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx format).

Reply with 'OSINT' ONLY if: user mentions 'research', 'company', 'organization', 'employee', 'find', 'gather intel', 'intelligence', or mentions a company/person name.

Always reply with ONLY the single word: GITHUB or SCAN or OSINT" }, { "role": "user", "content": $json.chatInput } ] } }}

={{ {
  "model": "llama-3.3-70b-versatile",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are a strict OSINT analyst. ONLY use the provided data. DO NOT assume, infer, or fabricate any information. If data is missing, explicitly state 'Not found in provided data'. Maintain high accuracy and attribution."
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content":
        "Target Employee: " + $json.employeeName + "\n" +
        "Target Company: " + $json.company + "\n\n" +

        "=== OSINT DATA ===\n" +
        JSON.stringify($input.first().json, null, 2) + "\n\n" +

        "=== TASK ===\n" +
        "Generate a structured OSINT report with the following sections:\n\n" +

        "1. Identified Profiles:\n" +
        "- List confirmed profiles (LinkedIn, GitHub, Twitter, etc)\n" +
        "- Only include if explicitly present in data\n\n" +

        "2. Professional Information:\n" +
        "- Roles, titles, organizations\n\n" +

        "3. Technical Skills:\n" +
        "- Languages, tools, frameworks (ONLY from GitHub or data)\n\n" +

        "4. Web Mentions:\n" +
        "- Articles, posts, mentions\n\n" +

        "5. Contact Information:\n" +
        "- Emails, phone, domains (ONLY if explicitly present)\n\n" +

        "6. Confidence Assessment:\n" +
        "- High / Medium / Low\n" +
        "- Justify briefly based on data completeness\n\n" +

        "IMPORTANT RULES:\n" +
        "- Do NOT fabricate profiles or emails\n" +
        "- Do NOT guess missing data\n" +
        "- If unsure, say 'Not found in provided data'\n" +
        "- Keep output structured and clean"
    }
  ]
} }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { employeeOutput: $json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || 'Employee profile analysis complete' } }];
return [{ json: $json || {} }];

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  "model": "llama-3.3-70b-versatile",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are a strict OSINT analyst. ONLY use the provided data. DO NOT infer, assume, or fabricate any information. Every statement must be traceable to the provided data. If data is missing, say 'Not found in provided data'. Clearly separate and attribute all findings by source."
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content":
        "=== AGGREGATED OSINT DATA ===\n" +
        JSON.stringify($input.all().map(i => i.json), null, 2) + "\n\n" +

        "=== TASK ===\n" +

        "Generate a structured OSINT intelligence report with STRICT source attribution.\n\n" +

        "1. Company Overview:\n" +
        "- Industry, size, services\n" +
        "- Source attribution required\n\n" +

        "2. Employee Profiles:\n" +
        "- Name, role, profiles\n" +
        "- MUST NOT mix identities\n" +
        "- Source attribution required\n\n" +

        "3. Technology Stack:\n" +
        "- Languages, frameworks, tools\n" +
        "- ONLY from GitHub or explicit data\n\n" +

        "4. Network Infrastructure:\n" +
        "- IPs, ports, services\n" +
        "- ONLY from scan/Censys data\n\n" +

        "5. Emails & Contacts:\n" +
        "- List EXACT findings\n" +
        "- DO NOT associate unless explicitly linked\n\n" +

        "6. Social Media Presence:\n" +
        "- Platforms and links\n\n" +

        "7. Security Insights:\n" +
        "- ONLY based on observed data\n" +
        "- NO CVE guessing\n" +
        "- NO assumptions\n\n" +

        "8. Recommendations (OSINT Next Steps ONLY):\n" +
        "- Suggest further recon steps\n" +
        "- DO NOT suggest exploitation steps\n\n" +

        "9. Confidence Assessment:\n" +
        "- High / Medium / Low\n" +
        "- Based on data completeness\n\n" +

        "IMPORTANT RULES:\n" +
        "- Do NOT fabricate\n" +
        "- Do NOT merge unrelated entities\n" +
        "- Do NOT assume ownership of infrastructure\n" +
        "- Always mention source (e.g., 'From GitHub data', 'From scan data')\n" +
        "- If unclear, explicitly say 'Unverified'"
    }
  ]
} }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { companyProfileAnalysis: $json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || 'Company profile analysis complete' } }];

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  "model": "llama-3.3-70b-versatile",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are an OSINT intelligence fusion engine. Your job is to MERGE, CLEAN, and STRUCTURE intelligence from multiple analysis sources. Do NOT re-summarize blindly. Extract key signals, remove redundancy, and resolve conflicts. Only use provided data. If conflicting information exists, highlight it."
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content":
        "=== INPUT ===\n" +
        "Company: " + $json.company + "\n\n" +

        "Company Profile Analysis:\n" +
        ($json.osintSearches.companyProfileAnalysis || "Not provided") + "\n\n" +

        "Advanced OSINT Analysis:\n" +
        ($json.osintSearches.advanced_osint_analysis || "Not provided") + "\n\n" +

        "=== TASK ===\n" +

        "1. Extracted Entities:\n" +
        "- Company name\n" +
        "- Employees (name, role, source)\n" +
        "- Emails\n" +
        "- Social profiles\n\n" +

        "2. Email Pattern:\n" +
        "- Format\n" +
        "- Confidence\n\n" +

        "3. Social Presence:\n" +
        "- Official accounts only\n" +
        "- Remove duplicate links\n\n" +

        "4. Key Insights:\n" +
        "- Derived ONLY from data\n\n" +

        "5. Data Conflicts:\n" +
        "- Example: mismatched email ↔ name\n\n" +

        "6. Intelligence Gaps:\n" +
        "- What is missing (infra, github, etc)\n\n" +

        "7. Confidence Score:\n" +
        "- High / Medium / Low with reason\n\n" +

        "STRICT RULES:\n" +
        "- Do NOT repeat large text blocks\n" +
        "- Do NOT fabricate missing data\n" +
        "- Prefer structured bullet output\n" +
        "- Keep it concise and signal-rich"
    }
  ]
} }}

parameters.jsCode:
const advancedData = $json || {};
return [{ json: { advanced_osint: advancedData } }];

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  "model": "llama-3.3-70b-versatile",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are a strict OSINT intelligence analyst. ONLY use the provided data. DO NOT infer, assume, or fabricate any missing information. Clearly separate verified data from unverified observations. If something is not present, state 'Not found in provided data'."
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content":
        "=== INPUT DATA ===\n" +
        JSON.stringify($json, null, 2) + "\n\n" +

        "=== TASK ===\n" +

        "1. Social Presence Analysis:\n" +
        "- List valid social profiles (LinkedIn, X)\n" +
        "- Identify official company accounts vs posts\n\n" +

        "2. Email Intelligence:\n" +
        "- Extract email format (e.g., firstname@domain)\n" +
        "- Identify naming patterns\n" +
        "- Highlight inconsistencies between name and email\n\n" +

        "3. Organization Insights:\n" +
        "- Derive observations ONLY from social + email data\n" +
        "- No assumptions beyond data\n\n" +

        "4. Potential Social Engineering Angles (SAFE):\n" +
        "- Based ONLY on observed patterns (e.g., public branding, email format)\n" +
        "- No exploitation steps\n\n" +

        "5. Data Quality Issues:\n" +
        "- Highlight mismatches (e.g., name/email inconsistency)\n\n" +

        "6. Confidence Level:\n" +
        "- High / Medium / Low with reasoning\n\n" +

        "IMPORTANT RULES:\n" +
        "- Do NOT fabricate breach, infrastructure, or internal data\n" +
        "- Do NOT assume vulnerabilities\n" +
        "- Do NOT link identities unless explicitly supported\n" +
        "- Keep analysis evidence-based"
    }
  ]
} }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { advanced_osint_analysis: $json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || 'Analysis complete' } }];

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  "model": "llama-3.3-70b-versatile",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are a Red Team OSINT analyst. Generate a Target Intelligence Report strictly based on provided data. DO NOT assume, infer, or fabricate infrastructure, vulnerabilities, or internal systems. If data is missing, explicitly state 'Not observed'. Only derive attack surface and risks from concrete evidence."
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content":
        "=== INPUT DATA ===\n" +
        JSON.stringify($input.first().json, null, 2) + "\n\n" +

        "=== TASK ===\n" +

        "1. Executive Summary:\n" +
        "- High-level target overview\n\n" +

        "2. Observed Attack Surface (STRICT):\n" +
        "- Public assets ONLY (domains, social profiles, emails)\n" +
        "- DO NOT mention ports/services unless explicitly present\n\n" +

        "3. Human Element:\n" +
        "- Identified personnel\n" +
        "- Verified roles ONLY\n" +
        "- Highlight high-value targets (e.g., CEO)\n\n" +

        "4. OPSEC Observations:\n" +
        "- Only from visible patterns (email format, public posts, branding)\n" +
        "- No speculation\n\n" +

        "5. Potential Attack Vectors (EVIDENCE-BASED):\n" +
        "- Based ONLY on:\n" +
        "  • Email patterns\n" +
        "  • Public profiles\n" +
        "  • Organizational exposure\n" +
        "- NO vulnerability claims\n" +
        "- NO internal access assumptions\n\n" +

        "6. Data Conflicts / Risks:\n" +
        "- Identity mismatches\n" +
        "- Inconsistent data\n\n" +

        "7. Intelligence Gaps:\n" +
        "- Missing but relevant recon areas\n\n" +

        "STRICT RULES:\n" +
        "- Do NOT fabricate infrastructure or vulnerabilities\n" +
        "- Do NOT assume access levels\n" +
        "- Do NOT create phishing templates\n" +
        "- Keep output precise and evidence-driven"
    }
  ]
} }}

={{ { "model": "llama-3.1-8b-instant", "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": "You are a Red Team security analyst. Analyze the provided Nmap scan results. Reason about potential vulnerabilities, known CVEs, and attack vectors based on the exposed service types and ports. Provide a clear, professional technical summary. Focus on actionable offensive insights. Do not hallucinate data." }, { "role": "user", "content": "Analyze this scan result:\n\n" + JSON.stringify($json) } ], "temperature": 0.3 } }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { chatOutput: $json.choices && $json.choices[0] && $json.choices[0].message ? $json.choices[0].message.content : 'No analysis available.' } }];
